policy_note: COVID-19 appears only as pandemic context for post-restriction GAS circulation rather than the DON event disease.
Acute respiratory infection is described as a possible severe manifestation of Nipah virus infection rather than a separate event disease.
COVID-19 is listed among possible causal factors for an undiagnosed disease event; do not adopt as confirmed event disease without later diagnostic confirmation.
Malaria is listed as a possible cause or contributor for an undiagnosed disease event; do not adopt as confirmed event disease without later diagnostic confirmation.
Acute respiratory infection is a syndrome description for seasonal influenza activity rather than a separate event disease label.
